indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets obstruct movement and create a cluttered environment.

indicators.name: Microwave
indicators.rationale: Microwave takes up valuable space and can be a tripping hazard.

indicators.name: Dining table
indicators.rationale: Dining table obstructs movement and can be a tripping hazard.

reasoning_summary: The space is not suitable for yoga or stretching due to the presence of cabinets, a microwave, and a dining table, which obstruct movement and create a cluttered environment.
